title: Eureka! Create Airships!
description: Create mod aesthetic on the Eureka mod.
body:
This pack revamps Eureka! Airships! to match to Create's art style much better.

 

If the helms are still showing their old steering wheel after applying the pack then you need to relaunch minecraft entirely. The helms get stuck with whatever model they have when they are placed.

 

Made to go along with Eureka! Create Airships! Datapack.
